Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — jackets.
All jackets sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Care Guide — jackets.
To extend the life of your jackets: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Product Guide — Mistcloak Pro.
The Mistcloak Pro is part of our jackets range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Rainwhistle Lite.
The Rainwhistle Lite is part of our jackets range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Sleetguard Insulated.
The Sleetguard Insulated is part of our jackets range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — backpacks.
Customers may return backpacks within 21 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — jackets.
Customers may return jackets within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters FAQ.
We ship to five regions: Ontario, Quebec, Prairie, Atlantic, Pacific. Delivery timelines and fees vary by region; see the regional shipping documents. Return windows vary by product category; see the category return policies. Current prices and stock are available only in the product catalog.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 2.
The Larkspindle 2 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 4.
The Larkspindle 4 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Kestrelloft Ridge.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Atlantic region.
Standard shipping to the Atlantic region costs $9.99 and express shipping costs $19.99. Orders to Atlantic arrive 3 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Ontario region.
Standard shipping to the Ontario region costs $6.99 and express shipping costs $17.99. Orders to Ontario arrive 5 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Pacific region.
Standard shipping to the Pacific region costs $4.99 and express shipping costs $17.99. Orders to Pacific arrive 3 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Prairie region.
Standard shipping to the Prairie region costs $9.99 and express shipping costs $17.99. Orders to Prairie arrive 4 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Quebec region.
